'''Zone Supplies, Ltd.''' was a company that produced security systems for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="RP" /> including [[Pressure Plate Trip]]s<ref name="CRFG" /> and [[Repulsor Trip]]s.<ref name="RoE" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Zone Supplies, Ltd. were on the list of legitimate targets for [[Rebel privateer]]s.<ref name="RP" />
